# External Review Triage Template

Use this template to normalize feedback from ChatGPT, Claude, Qwen, Gemini, a
human reviewer, or any other advisory source.

External review is input for investigation. It is not proof and it is not
listening acceptance.

## Source

Reviewer or system:

Date:

Input reviewed:

Link or local reference:

## Summary

Short summary in repository-ready language:

## Claims Worth Testing

| Claim | Affected Area | Evidence Needed | Proposed Action |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | Core | Measurement, fixture, listening, or docs |  |

## Unsupported Or Rejected Claims

| Claim | Reason |
| --- | --- |
|  | Unsupported by current evidence. |

## Repository Action

Choose one or more:

- create issue;
- create Labs experiment;
- create Knowledge note;
- update documentation;
- run diagnostic;
- reject/no action.

## Required Tests

- TBD

## Claim Discipline

- No "true binaural", "HRTF-accurate", "mastering-grade", or certified
  measurement claims unless current repository evidence proves them.
- No copyrighted source text copied into the repository.
- No private paths or source audio copied into the repository.
